task: Group A Session 1 — Profile use cases + migrate ProfileNotifier
notes: Created 4 profile use cases (Get/Create/Update/Delete). GetProfilesUseCase filters by ownerId=deviceId. CreateProfileUseCase always populates ownerId from DeviceInfoService. UpdateProfileUseCase: auth→fetch→validate→merge→save. DeleteProfileUseCase: A1 stub (auth+delete). Registered all in di_providers.dart with deviceInfoServiceProvider. Wired deviceInfoServiceProvider in bootstrap.dart. Migrated ProfileNotifier: removed _save(), uses repository + use cases, added forTesting() named constructor with no-op stubs. Removed local Profile class shadowing domain entity. Fixed home_screen.dart sentinel (removed ?? 'test-profile-001'). Added 13 use case unit tests. Updated 6 test files to override profileProvider/syncServiceProvider. Tests: 3488→3501. Analyzer clean.
